statement: In every magma, Equation 2524 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * z)) * w`) implies Equation 1988 (`x = (y * (z * y)) * (w * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0331
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z y)) (op w y))
